payload.answer: I cannot inspect or summarize mem_123 because its stored contents are not available in the provided input. To avoid inventing or presenting stale facts as current, no memory facts are returned.

entity_resolution.reason: The request targets a specific memory ID, but no underlying memory record or card contents were provided in the fixture, so the memory cannot be inspected safely.

details: Received inspect request for memory ID mem_123.
No memory payload or backend result was included.
Returned no durable facts to preserve ambiguity and avoid hallucinating memory contents.

repair_options: Provide the full stored record for mem_123 so it can be inspected.
Run the inspect command in an environment with access to the memory backend.
If available, include the memory card history, status, and any deletion/supersession metadata for mem_123.
